roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, payment callbacks, report outbox and Durable Object live usage engine
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer miniapps and imported-subscription lifecycle
roles.processor: optional advanced schedules, backups, campaigns and background reports

core: LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR -> class LiveUsageCoordinator (required for cron-free live usage)

features: automatically selects the only active sales location and skips the location-selection screen
hides change-location and back-to-locations buttons when only one active location exists
adjusts purchase step numbering from three steps to two steps for a single-location storefront
removes duplicated product title and normalized volume from plan buttons and selected-plan details
removes the duplicate sale:plans route so returning to products no longer restarts or repeats the purchase flow
deduplicates identical plan result rows by plan id before rendering
keeps volume at the beginning and amount at the end of each plan button
manual Telegram profile fields and all previous usage/payment fixes remain preserved

deployment.migration_tag: v3.1.9-live-usage (unchanged; no new Durable Object migration)
deployment.automatic_provisioning: supported when cf_account_id, cf_api_token and cf_worker_name are already saved and the token can update Workers scripts
deployment.activation: deploy core, edge and processor; the existing LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR binding and alarm state are reused
deployment.cron: the existing 10-minute central cron can remain; it is not used for live usage while the Durable Object binding is active

validation.single_location_auto_skip: passed by static route and session propagation checks
validation.single_sale_plans_route: passed; exactly one session-aware handler remains
